title: When Willie Comes Marching Home
writer: Sy Gomberg, Richard Sale, Mary Loos
actors: Dan Dailey, Corinne Calvet, Colleen Townsend
plot: Willie Kluggs enters the service with hopes of going overseas, but his uncanny marksmanship keeps him at home as a shooting instructor... much to his embarrassment.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
